description: Global registry of all domains supported by the Universal Prompt Runner

architecture.description: Architecture, construction, building design, and site analysis
example_prompts: Design a residential building for a 1000 sqft plot in Mumbai.
Analyze the site conditions for a construction project in Delhi.
Calculate construction cost for a commercial building.

legal.description: Legal research, contract analysis, document drafting, case assessment, and compliance
example_prompts: Review the employment contract for compliance under Indian law.
Research intellectual property regulations in the EU.
Draft a non-disclosure agreement for a software partnership.

finance.description: Investment analysis, risk assessment, budgeting, cost estimation, and financial reporting
example_prompts: Calculate the ROI for a 50 lakh investment over 5 years.
Assess the financial risk for a startup expansion plan.
Create a quarterly budget plan for the operations department.

healthcare.description: Patient assessment, treatment planning, medical research, clinical reporting, and healthcare compliance
example_prompts: Create a patient assessment report for a diabetic patient.
Develop a treatment plan for a patient with hypertension.
Research evidence-based treatments for stage 2 cancer.

software.description: Software system design, code review, database design, deployment planning, and bug analysis
example_prompts: Design the database architecture for a scalable e-commerce platform.
Review the Python code for performance and security issues.
Plan the deployment pipeline for a microservices application on AWS.

fallback.description: Fallback for unrecognized or ambiguous domain requests

onboarding.instructions: To add a new domain: create plugins/<domain_name>/plugin.json following the plugin schema, then register it in this file under 'domains'.
